recent_excerpts: Black Hills InfoSec published a practical guide to malware analysis covering static, dynamic, and memory analysis techniques for defenders seeking to reverse-engineer samples.
OpenAI is expanding access to its GPT-5.4-Cyber model, a specialized AI for reverse engineering and malware analysis, following the reveal of Anthropic's offensive-capable 'Mythos' model.

OpenAI is scaling its Trusted Access for Cyber (TAC) program, providing vetted security researchers and teams with prioritized access to the GPT-5.4-Cyber model for reverse engineering and vulnerabili
